_comment: Each entry overrides ConditionedSeparatorTrainer defaults. Only 'id' is required; it becomes the model filename suffix (separator_unet_film_multi_<id>.h5). Any field accepted by ConditionedSeparatorTrainer.__init__ can be set here: base_filters, batch_size, epochs, steps_per_epoch, n_val, learning_rate, patience, seed, negative_prob, bg_noise_prob, bg_snr_db_range, max_mix. The orchestration notebook iterates this list in order.
